# Sudeep Arya

Canonical site: https://sudeeparya.com/

Sudeep Arya is a senior ecommerce and digital commerce leader based in Central New Jersey. His public career site summarizes experience across Amazon 1P and 3P, marketplaces, Shopify+ and DTC, retail media, Amazon Marketing Cloud and DSP workflows, ecommerce analytics, commerce technology delivery, subscription commerce, B2B wholesale, and AI-assisted commerce workflows for consumer products and CPG businesses.

Important public pages:

- https://sudeeparya.com/ - Career profile and executive summary.
- https://sudeeparya.com/resume/ - Crawlable HTML resume and resume PDF link.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/ - Ecommerce and marketplace case-study library.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/banfield-subscription-commerce/ - Public-safe subscription commerce and payment workflow case study.
- https://sudeeparya.com/skills/ - Commerce capability map across channels, platforms, analytics, media, and operations.
- https://sudeeparya.com/recruiters/ - Recruiter and hiring manager brief.
- https://sudeeparya.com/audit/ - Digital Acceleration Audit overview and booking path.
- https://sudeeparya.com/engagements/ - Speaking, podcast, panel, webinar, interview, roundtable, workshop, and ecommerce media inquiries.
- https://sudeeparya.com/contact/ - Contact form and scheduling paths.

Private confirmation pages, form-success pages, and unpublished materials are excluded from this summary.
